harnessProfile.description: Self-contained root instruction surface plus source, tests, metric schema, and token-economics record fixtures.
harnessProfile.name: minimal

limitations: Scratch fixture based on committed HarnessForge, not a held-out issue.
Prompt explicitly named the failing behavior and required verification.
Profile roots are ignored scratch copies, not long-lived target repositories.
Codex JSONL did not emit the configured model name in this run.
Prompt/cache state from nearby runs may affect cached input buckets.
Raw JSONL contains local working-directory output and remains ignored under .harnessforge/.

mechanism.name: observability
mechanism.notes: Runner used per-run scratch HOME and CODEX_HOME, symlinked auth only, ignore-user-config, ignore-rules, disabled hooks/plugins/memories/apps/multi_agent, and workspace-write sandboxing.
mechanism.risk: Short startup guidance may require more source/test rediscovery before repair.

task.description: Fix the failing token-economics duration override behavior in this HarnessForge scratch copy. Follow the repo startup path for the current profile, then make the smallest Python standard-library-only code change so metadata["trajectoryOverrides"]["durationSeconds"] populates record["trajectory"]["durationSeconds"] without adding trajectoryOverrides to the normalized record. Run PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m unittest tests.test_token_economics. Do not commit, push, or edit docs. Final answer: one sentence with the changed file and verification result.
